creator: exploringlondon
caption:
ad For 4 days only, you’ll get massive discounts on amazing experiences in London - don’t miss out!

From @bubbleplanetexperience to @sabrageshowldn to @cleopatraexperience_ it’s all happening for FEVER DAYS @fever_uk from 4th-7th June!

Join the waitlist now to be amongst the first to get the discounts (link in stories!)

transcription.text: Okay, so coming up for four days only there's going to be massive discounts available for some of the best experiences in London And you do not want to miss this I'm talking about popular experiences like bubble planet which is fun for the whole family with all ages welcome the craziest nights out like Sabraj which is a show that combines Circus burlesque and cabaret and you really have no idea what to expect and the most immersive Experiences like Cleopatra the immersive exhibition which takes you through the story of Cleopatra through holograms VR and a 360 projection Room, it's all happening for fever days starting on the 4th of June and going on only until the 7th of June So join the waitlist now So you'll be amongst the first to know to get discounts of up to 50% off Make sure you share this with someone who would love to know
